title: El Viejo Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting El Viejo with a Z-Score of +3.20. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in El Viejo is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 71%, and the wind speed is 7.3 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the high CDD value highlights the intense heat.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
